candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=80%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and freeze — conviction without historical pattern confirmation is unproven direction, not tradeable edge.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green_match before trusting high-conviction direction
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
